title: boechera fendleri
intro: Boechera fendleri, also known as Fendler's rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, thanks to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. Boechera fendleri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
